calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alec Harrington for Shirley Kindred (Petitioner).

The Court noted that James Kindred is not present. Mr. Harrington stated that he has not heard anything from Mr. Kindred and that he did not get any papers. The Court noted that there are an unsigned and unverified objections from James Kindred, and that the objections are procedurally improper and therefore not before the Court, and that Mr. Kindred is not here to address them. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Continued To Jul-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
